subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! Hearken unto the Call of thy Lord from this Tree which hath been raised up in truth: verily, there is no God but Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی ان استمعی ندآء ربک من هذه السدره التی ارتفعت بالحق انه لا اله الا هو
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @thankfulness; gratitude
